headline: Micron surges 16% on blockbuster earnings
detail: Micron's blowout quarter signals strong AI-driven chip demand, lifting semiconductor sentiment broadly. This is direct tailwind for AVGO and your SMH ETF position, which is already your only meaningful winner. Watch whether the bounce is enough to change AVGO's TRIM status or just provides a better exit price.

headline: Iran tightens grip on Strait of Hormuz, oil rises
detail: Rising oil on geopolitical tension adds inflation pressure and can weigh on tech valuations through higher rates expectations. It's background risk rather than an immediate trigger, but sustained escalation historically rotates money out of growth and into energy. Keep it on radar given your 90% tech concentration on margin.

headline: Microsoft raises Xbox prices on soaring component costs
detail: This is a real-world data point that component cost inflation is hitting hardware makers, which is a mixed signal for chipmakers — higher ASPs can help, but it flags demand risk if consumers pull back. Relevant context for your chip-heavy book, especially AVGO's end-market exposure.
